title: The most expensive mistake serious investors make isn’t picking the wrong stock.
author: No_Cockroach_3231
selftext:
It’s committing capital when the market environment doesn’t deserve it.  
Right thesis. Right company. Wrong regime. Wrong sentiment. Position goes against you immediately.  
You weren’t wrong about the stock. You were wrong about the environment.  
Does any AI tool actually solve this — or are we all still figuring out the environment manually?
